User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a registered user within Synora with customized dashboard settings and preferences.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication user UID.

JournalEntry.title: Journal Entry
JournalEntry.description: A private reflection recorded by a user, complete with real-time AI sentiment analysis.

content.description: Raw markdown or text narrative text.

dominantEmotion.description: Primary emotional current (Joy, Sorrow, Anxiety, Calma).

MoodLog.title: Mood Log
MoodLog.description: A structured daily check-in logs capturing levels, energy states, sleep levels, and brief notes.

moodValue.description: Slider index from 1 (severe distress) to 5 (vibrant bliss).

ChatSession.title: Chat Session
ChatSession.description: An emotional support chat thread tracking contextual session info.

title.description: Topic or summarized subject of the conversation.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: An individual message block within an active companion chat session.

sessionId.description: Parent session session ID mapping constraint.

detectedEmotion.description: Sentiment overlay calculated by Gemini engine.

users/{userId}.description: Direct, single profile document storing key metadata, settings, and claims of each participant.

users/{userId}/journals/{journalId}.description: Subcollection under each user containing their private AI-enhanced journal logs.

users/{userId}/moodLogs/{moodLogId}.description: Subcollection under each user capturing daily micro check-ins, sleep levels, and physical inputs.

users/{userId}/chatSessions/{sessionId}.description: Active conversational channels created with their companion companion engine.

users/{userId}/chatSessions/{sessionId}/.description: Hierarchical thread records keeping continuous timeline context sync with the core engine.
